features: Professional Men's Grooming Kit: Cordless hair clippers set included powerful barber clippers and hair trimmer for men. Our professional hair clippers can meet all your manscaping needs at home, adjustable fade lever (0.8-2mm) offers precise control, you can freely adjust the length you want. The precision trimmer can handle the details of your hair and facial beard. No matter what kind of hair style this hair cutting kit can help you achieve well.

Powerful, Quiet Motor & Safe, Sharp Blades: The hair cutting kit equipped with ultra-sharp blade and high quality motor at 6200 RPM. Our trimmers for barbers can quickly cut off hair and beard without straining hair and irritating skin. The beard trimmer for men come with a zero gap T-blade, suitable for trim hair, beard, sideburns, neck, edges around face, meeting all men's grooming needs. Our fade clippers are suitable for kids haircut, because of the low noise motor and safe R-edge blade.

Long Battery Life & Elegant Design: Our shaving kit for men has high capacity (2000mAh、1800mAh) and long life battery. The edgers clippers can be used for 180 minutes after 3 hours of charging, precision trimmer can work for 150 minutes after 2 hours of charging. Our shaving machine have stylish and ergonomic exterior design, light weight, comfortable to hold. Equipped with LED display and indicator light, remind you to charge in time. Mustache trimmer's hanging ring is convenient for storage.

Men's 15 Pcs Clipper & Trimmer Kit: The professional cordless clippers for men included lubricating oil, cleaning brush, 2 USB charge line, 4pcs electric hair clippers guard attachments (1/8”3mm, 1/4”6mm, 3/8”10mm, 1/2”13mm) and 3pcs guide combs (1.5mm, 3mm, 4.5mm) for t outliner trimmer. You can simply trim fading, blending and art carving with our wireless hair trimmers. Our barber supplies can not only meet your daily use, but also meet the needs of professional occasion.

Perfect Gift for Men & Excellent Customer Service: Our haircut machine is a desirable choice for anyone looking for a reliable and versatile clippers and trimmers set. Our electric razor for men with long-lasting battery life, precision attachments and excellent performance, they're suitable gifts for men on Valentine's Day, anniversary, Christmas and birthday. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us. You can enjoy 12 months after sale, even if you miss the return window.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Professional Clipper 2 Precision Trimmer LED SCREEN DISPLAY Professional clipper with a clear LED smart display, you can clearly know the remaining power and remind you to charge it in time. ULTRA-SHARP AND SAFE BLADES Hair clipper equipped with ultra-sharp and safe blades, doesn't pull on your hair. 6300RMP POWERFUL MOTOR Barber clippers Up to 6300 RPM, provides the power to trim hair quickly without worrying about burning your skin. ADJUSTABLE FADE LEVER Adjustable fade lever (0.8-2mm) offers precise control, you can freely adjust the length you want. Previous page Next page 1 USB Charge 2 Sharp Blade Previous page Next page 1 Professional Clippers Set 2 Men's Grooming Kit 3 Gifts for Men Ufree Hair Clipper & Trimmer What You Get 1 cordless hair clipper, 1 beard trimmer, 7 guide combs, 2 blade guards, 2 usb charging cables, 1 oil bottle, 1 clean brush Running Time 200 minutes, 300 minutes Battery Charging Time 4 hours, 5 hours Battery Type Lithium-ion battery Comb Lengths 1/8”3mm, 1/4”6mm, 3/8”10mm, 1/2”13mm, 1.5mm, 3mm, 4.5mm Charging Connection Laptop, PC power bank, USB charger, AC adapter and etc. (Any standard USB ports) Motor Level 6300 RPM Worldwide Voltace 100-240V Is the clipper set sharp enough and safe enough? Our clipper and trimmer equipped with high quality blade, which trim hair quickly without pulling on the skin. And safe R-edge blade can avoid stabbing your hand. How do I clean the barbers kit? You can clean the blade under running water and clean the residual hair with brush. Please handle with care and 𝐚𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐝 𝐢𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐢𝐭 𝐢𝐧 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫. NOTE: Please turn off the clippers before cleaning. What kind of haircut can I get with this shaving machine? You can simply trim fading, blending and art carving with our wireless hair trimmers. What should I do if I encounter issue during using this hair clipper? If you got any issue when use our products, please don't hesitate to let us know at any time, we will reply you in 24 Hours and help solving the problem.
